description:
Step 2 of T-012's 4-step CSP roadmap. T-012 Step 1 (per-request nonce middleware + nonced script/style tags) landed in commit 6d1d9de.

## History

- **Round 1 (commit 6e1ba5b):** Infrastructure + 103/364 zero-arg handlers converted (28%). `static/js/actions.js` shipped delegated dispatcher.
- **Round 3 (this ticket, commits 497bfdf + 19f427d + 43dca6e):** Bulk-pattern slice. Migrated ~75 handler attributes total — 42 onerror via `data-on-error="hide"` shortcut, 14 mouse-hover pairs replaced with 4 CSS utility classes (`.b-hover-accent`, `.b-hover-surface`, `.b-hover-row`, `.b-hover-underline`), 3 zero-arg stopPropagation onclicks via new `data-stop` semantics. Dispatcher gained capture-phase `error` handling + `data-stop` attribute support. Net: 242 → 184 handlers remaining.

## Remaining work (tracked via follow-ups)

The remaining ~184 inline handlers all require per-feature decisions and form-level smoke testing. They are explicitly out of scope for this ticket and tracked here:

- **ISS-020** — fitting_tool.html innerHTML refactor (36 inline handlers embedded in JS string-concat — needs renderer rewrite, not regex).
- **ISS-021** — define data-click-arg dispatcher contract for arg-bearing handlers (~113 onclicks + 7 stopProp+arg sites).
- **ISS-022** — per-template migration sweep for structure_timers, gatecheck, discordtime, skill_plan_detail, component_panel, mining_ledger, etc. (~150 sites total including the post-contract slice from ISS-021).
- **ISS-023** — CSP report endpoint for violation telemetry (enables automated before/after diffing in the per-template rounds).
- **ISS-025** — intel.html scan history row hover rest-state visual side-effect from round 3 migration.

## Done when

T-033 (Step 4) flips Report-Only to enforcing without inline-handler violations on the major routes. This ticket as-written treats the 4 CSP roadmap steps as one — practically, T-031 closes when ISS-020/021/022 close. Status reflects round-3 completion of the bite-sized mechanical slice; per-template follow-ups are the path to T-033 readiness.
title: CSP Step 2: refactor 364 inline event handlers to addEventListener (VVP-2026-007)
